Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. A new C++ back end for ocamlc 170 upvotes, 14 comments
  2. Fast and Gorgeous Erosion Filter 148 upvotes, 14 comments
  3. Show HN: Git bayesect – Bayesian Git bisection for non-deterministic bugs 269 upvotes, 40 comments
  4. Weather.com/Retro 163 upvotes, 26 comments
  5. Reverse Engineering Crazy Taxi, Part 2 30 upvotes, 2 comments
  6. The revenge of the data scientist 138 upvotes, 27 comments
  7. Show HN: NASA Artemis II Mission Timeline Tracker 42 upvotes, 6 comments
  8. Email obfuscation: What works in 2026? 82 upvotes, 17 comments
  9. What Gödel Discovered (2020) 41 upvotes, 7 comments
  10. Quantum computing bombshells that are not April Fools 144 upvotes, 46 comments
  11. Mercor says it was hit by cyberattack tied to compromise LiteLLM 29 upvotes, 6 comments
  12. Steam on Linux Use Skyrocketed Above 5% in March 296 upvotes, 118 comments
  13. StepFun 3.5 Flash is #1 cost-effective model for OpenClaw tasks (300 battles) 158 upvotes, 72 comments
  14. Signing data structures the wrong way 100 upvotes, 44 comments
  15. AI for American-produced cement and concrete 189 upvotes, 110 comments
  16. The future of code search is not regex – 100x faster than ripgrep 42 upvotes, 18 comments
  17. Trinity Large Thinking 33 upvotes, 13 comments
  18. EmDash – A spiritual successor to WordPress that solves plugin security 554 upvotes, 399 comments
  19. Live: Artemis II Launch Day Updates 893 upvotes, 764 comments
  20. DRAM pricing is killing the hobbyist SBC market 456 upvotes, 375 comments
  21. Subscription bombing and how to mitigate it 127 upvotes, 93 comments
  22. Ask HN: Who is hiring? (April 2026) 234 upvotes, 196 comments
  23. The Claude Code Leak 136 upvotes, 110 comments
  24. AI Perfected Chess. Humans Made It Unpredictable Again 28 upvotes, 16 comments
  25. The Windows equivalents of the most used Linux commands 54 upvotes, 38 comments
  26. Show HN: Dull – Instagram Without Reels, YouTube Without Shorts (iOS) 78 upvotes, 62 comments
  27. SpaceX files to go public 303 upvotes, 397 comments
  28. They Planned Their Escape: A Systems Architect's Guide to the Iran Trade Scandal 6 upvotes, 3 comments
  29. Built a cheap DIY fan controller because my motherboard never had working PWM 3 upvotes, 1 comments
  30. Telli (YC F24) is hiring engineers, designers, and more [on-site, Berlin] 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 4:30pm, 2 April 2026. Source here.
